zh.Melun-Sud, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de: 法國瑟-吉馬內默倫梅倫-素德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Josselin De Melun II於大約1130年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內默倫時，他的父親Jean De Melun I21歲，母親Mathilde de Chartrette42歲。他於1150年與Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy在法國i萊-德-福朗斯默倫結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1172年6月20日在他的家鄉享年43歲。

zh-hans.Melun-Sud, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de: 法国瑟-吉馬內默倫梅倫-素德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Josselin De Melun II于大约1130年出生在法国瑟-吉馬內默倫时，他的父亲Jean De Melun I21岁，母亲Mathilde de Chartrette42岁。他于1150年与Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy在法国i萊-德-福朗斯默倫结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1172年6月20日在他的家乡享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Melun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Alvar, Anders, Hilmer, Hiltrud, Sven.

Swedish: probably an ornamental or habitational name formed with the (placename) element mel, from Old Norse methal ‘mid, middle’, + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’.
Czech (Melín): from a pet form of the personal name Melichar ‘Melchior’.

variants.name: Lemelin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Monique, Alcide, Armand, Damien, Emile, Gaston, Marcel, Rosaire.
French: from the personal name Melin (see Melin 4) or its cognate Emelin, with fused definite article l(e).
History: Jean Lemelin dit (Le) Tourangeau from Chartres in Eure-et-Loir, France, married Marguerite Brassard in Quebec City, QC, in 1658.

variants.name: Melichar
meanings: Czech; Slovak (also Melichár): from a vernacular form of the Biblical personal name Melchior .

variants.name: Meline
meanings: French: from a shortened form of the personal name Ameline, feminine form of Amelin (see Melin 4).

nameMeanings.name: Josselin
meanings: A female name, found written Joscelyne and Jocelin, and by corruption Joscelind. A diminutive formed from Latin Justus. The German name Jost is rendered Joscelin.

en.lifeSummary: When Josselin De Melun II was born about 1130, in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, his father, Jean De Melun I, was 21 and his mother, Mathilde de Chartrette, was 42. He married Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy in 1150, in Melun, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 20 June 1172, in his hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Josselin De Melun II est né environ 1130, à Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Jean De Melun I, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Chartrette, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy en 1150, à Melun, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 juin 1172, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Josselin De Melun II um 1130 in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean De Melun I 21 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Chartrette 42. Er hat 1150 in Melun, Île-de-France, Frankreich Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. Juni 1172 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Josselin De Melun II è nato il circa 1130 nel Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, il suo padre, Jean De Melun I, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Chartrette, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy nel 1150, nel Melun, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 giugno 1172, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Josselin De Melun IIが約1130年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメルンで生まれた時，父Jean De Melun Iは21歳，母Mathilde de Chartretteは42歳であった。1150年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスメルンでAlpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1172年6月20日に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Josselin De Melun II(이)가 대략 1130년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 멜루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean De Melun I(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Chartrette(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1150년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 멜루에서 Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1172년 6월 20일 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Josselin De Melun II nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Melun, Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Jean De Melun I, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Chartrette, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy em 1150, em Melun, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de junho de 1172, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Josselin De Melun II родился около 1130 г. в местности мелун, сине-ет-марн, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean De Melun I было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Chartrette, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy в 1150 г. в местности мелун, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 июня 1172 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Josselin De Melun II nació aproximadamente 1130, en Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Jean De Melun I, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Chartrette, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy en 1150, en Melun, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de junio de 1172, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años.
